studyName: California Teachers Study (CTS): Whole Genome Sequences From Under-Represented Populations

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique participant identifier

variables.name: age_baseline
variables.description: Age at the time of the baseline questionnaire (administered 1995)

variables.name: age_cancer
variables.description: Age at first incident cancer diagnosis between baseline and 12/31/2020.

variables.name: age_menarche
variables.description: Age at menarche

variables.name: alcohol_grams_baseline
variables.description: Category of alcohol grams/day in the past year at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: asthma
variables.description: Participant self-reported asthma on questionnaire 3, 4, 5, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: bmi_baseline
variables.description: Self-reported body mass index (kg/m2) at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: bmi_q5
variables.description: Self-reported body mass index (kg/m2) at Q5 (administered 2012)

variables.name: cancer_type
variables.description: Cancer type for first incident cancer diagnosis between baseline and 12/31/2020.  Other cancers with n <5 are grouped. Other cancer types diagnosed within this population include: Anus, Anal Canal and Anorectum; Gallbladder; Kidney and Renal Pelvis; Other Biliary; Other Endocrine including Thymus; Other Female Genital Organs; Other Non-Epithelial Skin; Ovary; Rectosigmoid Junction; Rectum; Small Intestine; Tonsil; Urinary Bladder; Uterus, NOS; Vulva

variables.name: dad_race
variables.description: Participant dad's race. Participants were included in this project if at least one parent was nonwhite

variables.name: deceased
variables.description: Vital status as of end of follow-up (12/31/2020), based on annual linkages with California Vital Statistics

variables.name: depression
variables.description: Participant self-reported depression on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: diab
variables.description: Participant self-reported diabetes on questionnaire 1, 4, 5, 6, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: dvt
variables.description: Participant self-reported deep vein thrombosis on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: ever_anycancer
variables.description: Participant has any record of cancer as of 12/31/2020. This includes self-reported cancer on the first CTS questionnaire.

variables.name: ever_breastcancer
variables.description: Participant has any record of breast cancer as of 12/31/2020. This includes self-reported breast cancer on the first CTS questionnaire.

variables.name: ht
variables.description: Ever used hormone therapy - incorporates participant responses from baseline through Q5

variables.name: htak
variables.description: Participant self-reported heart attack on questionnaire 1, 5, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: hypertension
variables.description: Participant self-reported hypertension on questionnaire 1, 5, 6, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: incident_anycancer
variables.description: Participant has an incident cancer diagnosis of any cancer between baseline and 12/31/2020.

variables.name: incident_breastcancer
variables.description: Participant has an incident breast cancer diagnosis between baseline and 12/31/2020.

variables.name: inflammatorybowel_crohns
variables.description: Participant self-reported inflammatory bowel/crohns syndrome on questionnaire 5, 6, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: kidneydisease
variables.description: Participant self-reported kidney disease on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: kidneystones
variables.description: Participant self-reported kidney stones on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: lupus
variables.description: Participant self-reported lupus on questionnaire 5 or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: menostat_baseline
variables.description: Menopausal status at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: menostat_q5
variables.description: Menopausal status at Q5 (administered 2012)

variables.name: migraines
variables.description: Participant self-reported migraines on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: mom_race
variables.description: Participant mom's race. Participants were included in this project if at least one parent was nonwhite

variables.name: multiple_cancers
variables.description: Indicator of if a participant had multiple incident cancers between baseline and 12/31/2020.

variables.name: nsaid_q5
variables.description: Current use of NSAID at Q5 (administered 2012)

variables.name: oc_ever_baseline
variables.description: Ever used oral contraceptives at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: oc_years_baseline
variables.description: Total years used oral contraceptives at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: osteoarthritis
variables.description: Participant self-reported osteoarthritis on questionnaire 5, 6, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: osteoporosis
variables.description: Participant self-reported osteoporosis on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: parity_baseline
variables.description: Total number of pregnancies at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: parity_q2
variables.description: Total number of pregnancies at Q2 (administered 1997)

variables.name: parkinsons
variables.description: Participant self-reported Parkinson's on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: phys_act_baseline
variables.description: Strenuous/moderate hours exercise past 3 years at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: phys_act_q5
variables.description: Strenuous/moderate hours exercise past 3 years at Q5 (administered 2012)

variables.name: preg_ever_baseline
variables.description: Ever pregnant at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: preg_ever_thru_q4
variables.description: Participant reported ever being pregnant on questionnaire 1, 2 or 4

variables.name: psoriasis
variables.description: Participant self-reported psoriasis on questionnaire 5, 6, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: race_category
variables.description: Participant self-reported race combined with parents' race

variables.name: response_q2
variables.description: Participant responded to the second questionnaire, Q2 (administered 1997)

variables.name: response_q3
variables.description: Participant responded to the third questionnaire, Q3 (administered 2000)

variables.name: response_q4
variables.description: Participant responded to the fourth questionnaire, Q4 (administered 2005)

variables.name: response_q5
variables.description: Participant responded to the fifth questionnaire, Q5 (administered 2012)

variables.name: response_q6
variables.description: Participant responded to the sixth questionnaire, Q6 (administered 2017)

variables.name: rheuma
variables.description: Participant self-reported rheumatoid arthritis on questionnaire 5, 6, or the blood draw questionnaire

variables.name: ses
variables.description: SES population-based quartiles created by incorporating occupation, education and income 1990 census block group variables

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Sex

variables.name: shingles
variables.description: Participant self-reported shingles on questionnaire 5 or 6

variables.name: smoke_stat_baseline
variables.description: Smoking status (smoked at least 100 cigarettes in entire lifetime) at baseline (administered 1995)

variables.name: statin_q5
variables.description: Current use of statin medication at Q5 (administered 2012)

variables.name: stroke
variables.description: Participant self-reported stroke on questionnaire 1 or 5

variables.name: year_baseline
variables.description: Year participant completed the baseline questionnaire (administered 1995)

variables.name: year_blood_draw
variables.description: Year of blood draw (sample collection from 2013-2016)

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by IRB

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
